--- match_coverage_hints.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
-- Hints coverage
MATCH (a:Person {name: "Alex"}), @{JOIN_METHOD=HASH_JOIN} (a)-[:Owns]->(acc:Account)
RETURN *
NEXT
MATCH (p:Person {id:1})-[e:Owns]->@{JOIN_METHOD=APPLY_JOIN}(a:Account)
RETURN *
NEXT
MATCH (p:Person {id: 1})@{JOIN_METHOD=APPLY_JOIN}-[e:Owns]->(a:Account)
RETURN *
NEXT
MATCH (a:Account {id:7})-[@{INDEX_STRATEGY=FORCE_INDEX_UNION} :Transfers]-(oa:Account)
RETURN *
NEXT
RETURN p.name, COUNT(*) AS num_account
GROUP @{GROUP_METHOD=HASH_GROUP} BY p.name

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    33,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  39,
                          Rparen:  63,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 40,
                              NameEnd: 41,
                              Name:    "a",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 41,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 42,
                                  NameEnd: 48,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                            Properties: &ast.GQLProperties{
                              Lbrace: 49,
                              Rbrace: 62,
                              Fields: []*ast.GQLPropertyField{
                                &ast.GQLPropertyField{
                                  Name: &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 50,
                                    NameEnd: 54,
                                    Name:    "name",
                                  },
                                  Value: &ast.StringLiteral{
                                    ValuePos: 56,
                                    ValueEnd: 62,
                                    Value:    "Alex",
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Hint: &ast.Hint{
                    Atmark:  66,
                    Rbrace:  89,
                    Records: []*ast.HintRecord{
                      &ast.HintRecord{
                        Key: &ast.Path{
                          Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                            &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 68,
                              NameEnd: 79,
                              Name:    "JOIN_METHOD",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                        Value: &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 80,
                          NameEnd: 89,
                          Name:    "HASH_JOIN",
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  91,
                          Rparen:  93,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 92,
                              NameEnd: 93,
                              Name:    "a",
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  94,
                          EndPos:    104,
                          Direction: "RIGHT",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Label:    &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 96,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 97,
                                  NameEnd: 101,
                                  Name:    "Owns",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  104,
                          Rparen:  116,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 105,
                              NameEnd: 108,
                              Name:    "acc",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 108,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 109,
                                  NameEnd: 116,
                                  Name:    "Account",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 118,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 125,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    132,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  138,
                          Rparen:  154,

      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            Optional: -1,
            Match:    303,
            Pattern:  &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  309,
                          Rparen:  326,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 310,
                              NameEnd: 311,
                              Name:    "a",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 311,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 312,
                                  NameEnd: 319,
                                  Name:    "Account",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                            Properties: &ast.GQLProperties{
                              Lbrace: 320,
                              Rbrace: 325,

                                  Name: &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 321,
                                    NameEnd: 323,
                                    Name:    "id",
                                  },
                                  Value: &ast.IntLiteral{
                                    ValuePos: 324,
                                    ValueEnd: 325,
                                    Base:     10,
                                    Value:    "7",
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLEdgePattern{
                          StartPos:  327,
                          EndPos:    377,
                          Direction: "ANY",
                          Filler:    &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Hint:     &ast.Hint{
                              Atmark:  329,
                              Rbrace:  363,
                              Records: []*ast.HintRecord{
                                &ast.HintRecord{
                                  Key: &ast.Path{
                                    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                                      &ast.Ident{
                                        NamePos: 331,
                                        NameEnd: 345,
                                        Name:    "INDEX_STRATEGY",
                                      },
                                    },
                                  },
                                  Value: &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 346,
                                    NameEnd: 363,
                                    Name:    "FORCE_INDEX_UNION",
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 365,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 366,
                                  NameEnd: 375,
                                  Name:    "Transfers",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  377,
                          Rparen:  388,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 378,
                              NameEnd: 380,
                              Name:    "oa",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              Is:    -1,
                              Colon: 380,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 381,
                                  NameEnd: 388,
                                  Name:    "Account",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 390,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 397,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 404,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.Path{
                  Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                    &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 411,
                      NameEnd: 412,
                      Name:    "p",
                    },
                    &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 413,
                      NameEnd: 417,
                      Name:    "name",
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: -1,
                Expr: &ast.CountStarExpr{
                  Count:  419,
                  Rparen: 426,
                },
                Alias: &ast.AsAlias{
                  As:    428,
                  Alias: &ast.Ident{
                    NamePos: 431,
                    NameEnd: 442,
                    Name:    "num_account",
                  },
                },
              },
            },
            GroupBy: &ast.GroupBy{
              Group: 443,
              Hint:  &ast.Hint{
                Atmark:  449,
                Rbrace:  474,
                Records: []*ast.HintRecord{
                  &ast.HintRecord{
                    Key: &ast.Path{
                      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                        &ast.Ident{
                          NamePos: 451,
                          NameEnd: 463,
                          Name:    "GROUP_METHOD",
                        },
                      },
                    },
                    Value: &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 464,
                      NameEnd: 474,
                      Name:    "HASH_GROUP",
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
              Exprs: []ast.Expr{
                &ast.Path{
                  Idents: []*ast.Ident{
                    &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 479,
                      NameEnd: 480,
                      Name:    "p",
                    },
                    &ast.Ident{
                      NamePos: 481,
                      NameEnd: 485,
                      Name:    "name",
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH (a:Person {name: "Alex"}), @{JOIN_METHOD=HASH_JOIN} (a)-[:Owns]->(acc:Account) RETURN * NEXT MATCH (p:Person {id: 1})-[e:Owns]->@{JOIN_METHOD=APPLY_JOIN} (a:Account) RETURN * NEXT MATCH (p:Person {id: 1})@{JOIN_METHOD=APPLY_JOIN} -[e:Owns]->(a:Account) RETURN * NEXT MATCH (a:Account {id: 7})-[@{INDEX_STRATEGY=FORCE_INDEX_UNION} :Transfers]-(oa:Account) RETURN * NEXT RETURN p.name, COUNT(*) AS num_account GROUP @{GROUP_METHOD=HASH_GROUP} BY p.name
